target.title: feat(status): show session costs
target.body:
## Summary
- Use transcript `usage.cost.total` for `/status` cost when available, so the status card can show cumulative transcript-backed session cost instead of only a pricing-table estimate.
- Add a conditional `Cost` column to `openclaw status` recent session rows when at least one shown session has persisted cost.
- Update status/cost docs for the new behavior.

## Linked context
Fixes #64334.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
Behavior addressed: `/status` and `openclaw status` now surface existing session cost data.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on macOS using an isolated temporary OpenClaw state directory with one session store and transcript; CLI launched with temporary Node v24.16.0 because the system Node v22.15.0 is below OpenClaw's runtime guard.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_HOME="/var/folders/6l/gn1ygj3d28s_pdrxjqkzc1440000gn/T/opencode/status-proof-94308/home" OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR="/var/folders/6l/gn1ygj3d28s_pdrxjqkzc1440000gn/T/opencode/status-proof-94308/state" PATH="/var/folders/6l/gn1ygj3d28s_pdrxjqkzc1440000gn/T/opencode/corepack-bin:$PATH" corepack pnpm dlx node@24 openclaw.mjs status`
Evidence after fix: Real CLI output included the Sessions table below from the isolated OpenClaw state:

```text
Sessions
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Key                               в”Ӯ Kind   в”Ӯ Age     в”Ӯ Model           в”Ӯ Runtime          в”Ӯ Tokens         в”Ӯ Cost    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ agent:main:main                   в”Ӯ direct в”Ӯ unknown в”Ӯ claude-opus-4-6 в”Ӯ OpenClaw Default в”Ӯ 45/32k (0%)    в”Ӯ $0.0063 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

Observed result after fix: The actual `openclaw status` path rendered the new `Cost` column and displayed `$0.0063`, matching the cumulative transcript usage costs `0.0021 + 0.0042` stored in the isolated session transcript.
What was not tested: Full test suite; local default Node is below the repo-requested `>=22.19.0`, so `corepack pnpm ...` validation commands emitted engine warnings unless the proof command used temporary Node 24.

## Additional verification
- `corepack pnpm docs:list`
- `corepack pnpm check:docs`
- `corepack pnpm test src/commands/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/status/status-message.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.types.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/commands/status.test-support.ts src/commands/status.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Known proof notes
- The branch was rebased onto current `origin/main`; the previous plugin-sdk CI failure in `src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts` passes on the rebased branch.
- Global `corepack pnpm format:check` reports unrelated pre-existing formatting issues outside the touched files; the changed source files pass the scoped formatter check.
